title: Claim
description: Atomic legal claim emitted by the Drafter sub-agent. Every assertion in a deliverable is a claim. R3 NoMemoryStatutes requires assertion-kind claims to have ≥1 cite from retrieval_log; R4 QuotingRule requires every quoted span to be a structured anchor; R6 PinpointCite enforces per-kind citation completeness.

ledger_position.description: 0-indexed position in the claim ledger. Append-only; ledger_position uniquely orders claims within a run.

kind.description: Discriminator. assertion: substantive legal claim (R3 applies). transition: connective text (R3 does NOT apply; no cites required). definition: presents a defined term from a Definitions section. interpretation: applies canons of construction or interprets language. conclusion: aggregates prior claims into a final answer.

text.description: The claim's prose. Quoted spans within the text must be moved to quotes[] with anchors (R4); raw quotation marks in this string fail Drafter validation.

cites.description: Pinpoint citations supporting this claim. R3 requires assertion claims to have ≥1 cite. R14 limits kind to citation_eligible.

text.description: The exact quoted span as it appears in the source.

render_as.description: How the Renderer should display the quote. 'block' is for long quotes; 'italics'/'emphasis' for short scare quotes that should not appear in quotation marks at render time.

quotes.description: Anchored quotes used inside this claim's text. R4 + R5 enforce.

relies_on_holding.description: When true and the claim has a case_law cite, R6 PinpointCite requires that cite to include pinpoint_page. Set by the Drafter when the claim's force depends on the case's specific reasoning rather than its general existence.

relies_on_exemption.description: When true, R15 CompletenessGate's exemption criterion is activated. Set by the Drafter when the analysis concludes the rule applies/doesn't apply because a statutory exemption was satisfied/not satisfied.

relies_on_paraphrase.description: True when the claim's substantive content is paraphrased from a source (not directly quoted). Default true because most claims paraphrase. False only when the claim is purely structural transition. Drives W2 ParaphraseDriftCheck.

confidence.description: Drafter's self-reported confidence in this specific claim. Aggregated by the Confidence sub-agent into the deliverable-level R11 rating.

verify_flag_id.description: Optional reference to a verify_flag in the deliverable's verify_flags[]. R13 caps total flags at 3 across the deliverable, regardless of how many claims reference flags.

canon_applied.description: Canons of construction applied to reach this claim. When 2+ canons fire and produce different outcomes, W4 CanonConflictDeclared requires the conflict be declared in deliverable.canon_conflicts[].
